The '''Mission to Almaran''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike-reconnaissance mission during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in order to gauge the strength of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']] and eliminate Imperial [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]] supplies.

==Arrival==
Knowing the trajectory of the Imperial fleet, [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] dispatched [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing starfighters]] to an Imperial rallying point in the [[Almaran system]]. The Rogues arrived early, but they did not have to wait long before their first marks came out of hyperspace.

==Scanning the fleet==
There was lot of work awaiting the Rogues: six [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]], a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] and a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] were among the first wave to drop out of hyperspace. Each vessel had to be scanned and identified for [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]], and all cargo ships found to be carrying warheads were to be destroyed.

Surprisingly, little reaction came from the Imperial side, even when the A-wings started to wreak havoc on their munitions freighters. The Rogues managed to take down two bulk freighters, a [[cargo ferry]], two [[modular conveyor]]s, and even a [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|modified Corellian corvette]], all carrying valuable warheads, while scanning all other vessels in the area as well.

One by one, more Imperial ships dropped out of hyperspace, getting gradually bigger, until even the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']] herself had arrived and allowed Rogue Squadron to finish its task.

==Aftermath==
The intelligence gathered on this mission proved valuable for Alliance High Command, which decided the time to strike had come. [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Calamari Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] would soon be dispatched to raid the task force in order to draw ships away from them, and into a trap.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
